title: FBI-UAP-D002, FD-1057, Unresolved UAP Report, Colorado Springs, 2022
summary: This document is an FBI FD-1057, a form the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) uses to record investigative activity. This FD-1057 contains a first-hand narrative description of unidentified anomalous phenomena (UAP) reported near Colorado Springs, Colorado. The interviewee provided this statement to FBI special agents to aid in producing a digital artistic interpretation of the incident.
csv_raw_title: FBI-UAP-D002, FD-1057, Unresolved UAP Report, Colorado Springs, 2022

audience.tldr: FBI investigative document from a Bureau case file documenting a UAP encounter (2022) over Colorado Springs, Colorado, U.S..
what_we_know: Reported location: Colorado Springs, Colorado, U.S..
what_we_dont: Redacted portions may contain identifying or technical detail.
No kinematic data (speed, altitude, maneuver) is attached.
No official conclusion has been issued classifying the object as conventional.
audience.mundane_candidate: A conventional explanation is technically possible but has not been demonstrated.
audience.score_sentence: Anomalousness Index 55/100. Top drivers: witness credibility (federal_agent), corroboration (single_witness_instrument).
